abc/ABCMeta/__subclasshook__.name: __subclasshook__
abc/ABCMeta/__subclasshook__.description: (Must be defined as a class method.) Check whether subclass is considered a subclass of this ABC. This means that you can customize the behavior of issubclass() further without the need to call register() on every class you want to consider a subclass of the ABC. (This class method is called from the __subclasscheck__() method of the ABC.) This method should return True, False or NotImplemented.
